description_text: Detail Features: Brand new never used or installed Made From High Quality ABS Plastic Comes With Double Side Adhesive Tape Dimension: 83.5 x 15.5cm Almost Universal INSTALLATION: THIS PRODUCT RECOMMENDS PROFESSIONAL INSTALLATION. Any damage during installation will not be refunded Package included: 1 x Bumper Splitter Lip(come with double side adhesive tape) Reviews Shipping Policy Payment Mathord Returns Policy About Feedback Item will be shipped out within 48 hours upon receipt of your payment. We ship the item through Hong Kong Air mail. Please make sure your address in eBay is correct. If you want to change the address, please give us ebay message right away you make the payment. Combing shipment is not allowed. If you wants to combine all the items together, you should still pay for all of the shipping, insurance and handing fees. Considering the cost of business and easy shipping, usually the item is packed in retail packaging. Normally, the item will arrive in 15-20 days. But sometimes it takes a little bit longer, goes to 20-30 days or more.
